message.content:
@startuml
actor ": Teacher" as Teacher
boundary ": UpdateRollCallForm" as UpdateRollCallForm
control ": StudentController" as StudentController
entity ": RollCall" as RollCall
entity ": ClassroomMember" as ClassroomMember

Teacher -> UpdateRollCallForm : 1 // request update roll call
UpdateRollCallForm -> StudentController : 2 // request update roll call
StudentController -> ClassroomMember : 3 // checking information is valid

alt [information is valid]
    StudentController <-- ClassroomMember : 5 // Information is valid
    StudentController -> RollCall : 6 // Request make roll call
    UpdateRollCallForm <-- StudentController : 8 // Roll call update done
    Teacher <-- UpdateRollCallForm : 9 // Roll call done

else [information is not valid]
    StudentController <-- ClassroomMember : 5.1 // Information is not valid
    UpdateRollCallForm <-- StudentController : 5.2 // Roll call update failed
    Teacher <-- UpdateRollCallForm : 5.3 // Roll call failed,\ncheck information again
end

@enduml
